Meet Nickel Sew — a professional seamstress in Mauritius who needed more than a Facebook page to grow her business.

We built her a full website in under 3 days: before/after gallery, WhatsApp booking flow, loyalty programme, and sustainability story.

The result? A professional online presence that converts visitors into paying clients — not just followers.

That's what a real website does. 🪡
